subcodes.title: Du’a’a’l-Huzn
subcodes.first_line: He is the All-Glorious! I know not, O my God, for what sin Thou hast cast me out [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الفرد المعتمد. هو العزیز لم ادریا الهی بایذنب اخرجتنی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
